summary.en: A strategic analysis framework for pressure-testing a business model against external forces: key trends, market forces, industry forces, and macro-economic forces.
summary.zh: 一套用外部环境压力测试商业模式的战略分析框架：系统扫描关键趋势、市场力量、行业力量和宏观经济力量。

sources.label: Osterwalder & Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley · 2010 · Business Model Environment
Strategyzer Library · How to scan through your environment's disruptive threats and opportunities
Michael E. Porter · Competitive Strategy · Free Press · 1980

references.label: Alexander Osterwalder & Yves Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley

note.en: Canonical source for the four-force Business Model Environment map and its link back to BMC pressure points.
note.zh: 商业模式环境四类力量及其与 BMC 压力点联动的经典来源。

references.label: Strategyzer Library · How to scan through your environment's disruptive threats and opportunities

note.en: Practical guidance for treating environment signals as threats, opportunities, and constraints rather than generic trend notes.
note.zh: 说明如何把环境信号当作威胁、机会和约束处理，而不是泛泛记录趋势。

references.label: Michael E. Porter · Competitive Strategy · Free Press

note.en: Useful lens for the Industry Forces quadrant: rivalry, entrants, substitutes, suppliers, and buyers, extended here with stakeholders.
note.zh: 可用于行业力量象限：竞争者、新进入者、替代品、供应商和买方，并在本框架中扩展到利益相关者。
